title: MBLEx D4 Benefits & Effects of Soft Tissue Manipulation v1

questions.prompt: Which effect is most associated with reduced overall arousal during a session?

choices.A: Immediate cure of asthma through massage alone.
choices.B: Guaranteed normalization of all breathing disorders.
choices.C: Slower breathing and reduced overall arousal.
choices.D: Permanent lowering of heart rate for days after one session.

questions.answer: Slower breathing and reduced overall arousal.
questions.why: This option best matches typical physiological and perceptual responses associated with massage.
questions.trap: Guaranteed normalization of all breathing disorders. sounds appealing, but it overpromises or claims effects beyond what massage reliably provides.
